sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23960" key="delea/stra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δελε-άστρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n23960.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">baited trap</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">noose,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:216" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">216</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
